parameters.query:
SELECT 
    PO.POHNUM_0 as Bon_Command,
	PO.BPSNUM_0 as code_Tier,
	PO.BPRNAM_0 as Raison,
	PO.PJTH_0 as Affaire,
	DP.XNUM_0 as DFF,
	PO.CREUSR_0 as User_creation,
	PO.CREDAT_0 as Date_creation,
	CNT.WEB_0 AS Email
FROM 
	BASE1.PORDER PO
LEFT JOIN 
    BASE1.XDEPFACT DP ON DP.XCMD_0 = PO.POHNUM_0
LEFT JOIN 
	-- recuperer les addresses email
	BASE1.CONTACT CNT ON PO.BPSNUM_0 = CNT.BPANUM_0

WHERE 
    -- Vos filtres sur PORDER
    PO.INVFLG_0 = 1    -- Non facturé
    -- AND PO.CLEFLG_0 = 2 -- Soldé Oui
    AND PO.RCPFLG_0 in (2, 3) -- a une reception ou plus
    
    -- Le filtre pour exclure ce qui existe dans XDEPFACT
    AND ( DP.XFACT_0='')
	AND PO.CREDAT_0>'20260101'

parameters.subject: =Demande de facture pour bon de commande n° {{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.Bon_Command }}
